title: Passport Evidence Metadata
description: MAAT specific metadata required to process passport evidence

evidenceDueDate.description: The date the evidence is due

evidenceReceivedDate.description: The date the evidence was received

upliftAppliedDate.description: The date when contributions uplift was applied

upliftRemovedDate.description: The date when contributions uplift was removed

firstReminderDate.description: The date when the first reminder letter should be sent

secondReminderDate.description: The date when the second reminder letter should be sent
